svg.text: Spring GenAI — AWS Bedrock AgentCore Architecture
Spring Boot · Spring AI · AWS Bedrock Nova Lite · OpenTelemetry · AgentCore Memory (Events API)
OpenTelemetry Logback Appender · Spring Actuator (Traces · Metrics)
OTLP metrics export disabled by default (ADOT owns prod export)
Local: OTel Collector :4317/:4318 → Jaeger · Prometheus · Loki
Spring AI Memory Chain (conditional on AGENTCORE_MEMORY_ID env var)
AGENTCORE_MEMORY_ID unset → Spring AI default InMemoryChatMemoryRepository
